$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026; inherits diagram-component-authoring shape from cycle 107.

step_1_capture_state.target_surface: site/src/components/diagrams/ConvergenceFunnel.astro (2nd component in the diagram library) + additive consumer-side wiring into one MDX content surface
step_1_capture_state.method: agentic discovery + cycle 107 carry-forward consumption (design_finding_for_cycle_108 recommended ConvergenceFunnel)

pre_change_inventory.convergence_model_canonical_4_stages_per: Vault → Campaign → Mission → Objective (per CLAUDE.md Convergence Model table at root + Project SO #5/8/9 referencing context_adna_core_ooda_cascade.md + context_prompt_engineering_convergence_model.md)
pre_change_inventory.existing_convergence_consumer: site/src/content/docs/convergence.mdx uses MermaidDiagram LR graph (Campaign → Mission → Objective → Session); do NOT swap per cycle 107 AVOID
natural_consumer_options: (a) site/src/content/docs/mission-decomposition.mdx — patterns page; ASCII hierarchy code block; no existing diagram; natural fit for ConvergenceFunnel as additive companion
(b) site/src/content/docs/lattice-campaign-execution.mdx — workflow lattice example page; secondary fit
(c) NEW concepts page — out of scope cycle 108
pre_change_inventory.decision: Option (a) — mission-decomposition.mdx; additive after the ASCII hierarchy code block; zero existing-content disturbance.

step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: Cycle 108 (a) authors ConvergenceFunnel.astro inheriting TriadDiagram patterns (inline SVG + currentColor + role=img + aria-labelledby + optional Props + figure/figcaption); (b) introduces directional arrows between bands (per cycle 107 design_finding — convergence IS asymmetric flow, distinct from triad symmetric relationships); (c) wires component into mission-decomposition.mdx as additive consumption proof.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated; 5-question Q&A; focus shift from triad (symmetric triangle) to funnel (asymmetric top-down narrowing)
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Visual Style (trapezoidal bands vs nested rectangles vs proper funnel/cone) + Q2 Clarity (narrowing visual cue is the central affordance) + Q3 Hierarchy (top-to-bottom reading order) + Q4 Bloat (4 bands + arrows + labels + details = is this too dense?) + Q5 Accessibility (semantic role=img + aria-labelledby with sequential description)
step_2_persona_qa.design_question_at_cycle_entry: Should the funnel narrow continuously (single smooth cone) or step-wise (4 discrete trapezoidal bands)? Should the arrows be visually prominent (dominate the connectors) or subtle (small chevron marker)?

persona_consensus.design_critic: Step-wise trapezoidal bands are RIGHT — discrete stages match the discrete execution hierarchy levels (Vault, Campaign, Mission, Objective are NOT a continuum; each is a distinct unit). Single-cone would imply continuous narrowing which contradicts the convergence model's discrete steps. Subtle chevron arrows (marker, not full-stroke) keep the arrows from visually competing with the band content — readers see narrowing-shape first, arrows second. Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_consensus.visual_designer: 1.6 stroke-width consistency with cycle 103+106+107 icon+TriadDiagram vocabulary maintained. The marker-end approach for arrows is clean (no manual polyline math; SVG handles orientation). var(--color-bg) fill on bands prevents text/edge overlap. 4 bands at 56px tall + 8px arrow gap = 248px total content + 16px margin = 264px utilized of 320px viewBox = generous breathing room. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_consensus.diagram_reviewer: Two-line label-detail structure per band works well (Vault / Total knowledge; Campaign / Hundreds of files → tens; etc.) — primary label is bold display-font; detail is body-font opacity 0.75. Operator can omit detail field per stage (the {bands.some(b => b.stage.detail) && ...} guard hides the detail group if NO stages have details; per-stage conditional handles partial fills). Operator can override stages prop to swap labels (e.g., Campaign → Mission → Objective → Session for the execution-hierarchy framing). Score 4.5/5.0 Explanation_Quality.
persona_consensus.accessibility_auditor: <title> + <desc> provide sequential description ('Four stages arranged in a top-down funnel that narrows at each step. Top to bottom: ...'). Screen reader reads the narrowing-funnel concept + the stage sequence + the per-stage detail (since SVG <text> elements are read in document order). Score 4.5/5.0 Visual_Clarity.
persona_consensus.newcomer_stress_tester: Visual narrowing (top wide → bottom narrow) IS the affordance — even without reading labels, a newcomer immediately grasps 'this is a narrowing process'. Combined with the stage labels + details ('Vault / Total knowledge' → 'Objective / The exact files needed'), the funnel teaches the convergence model in <5 seconds. Cognitive_Load score: 4.5/5.0.

step_2_persona_qa.qa_synthesis: 5/5 personas converge on (a) trapezoidal step-wise bands + (b) subtle chevron marker arrows + (c) two-line label-detail per band + (d) operator-overridable stages + (e) role=img with aria-labelledby + sequential <desc>. No image generation needed.

step_3_generate_or_regen_images.decision: NO image generation — ConvergenceFunnel is build-time-rendered inline SVG with geometric primitives + text + marker arrows; zero Imagen calls.

files_modified: site/src/components/diagrams/ConvergenceFunnel.astro (NEW — 156 lines; viewBox 320x320; 4 trapezoidal bands stacked vertically with widths 280→220→160→100→40 progression; 3 connecting arrows with marker-end chevron; SVG-native text labels + details; Props extend HTMLAttributes<'figure'> with optional stages tuple [4] + caption + ariaLabel; titleId+descId random suffixes prevent collision; tokens.css design tokens consumed via var(--font-display) + var(--font-body) + var(--color-bg) + var(--color-text-muted) + var(--space-*); 23 lines of scoped <style>)
site/src/content/docs/mission-decomposition.mdx (+ 1 import line + 1 component tag with caption; ZERO existing content disturbed)
step_4_implement.implementation_notes: ConvergenceFunnel inherits TriadDiagram's overall scaffolding (figure wrapper + svg with viewBox + role=img + aria-labelledby + <title>+<desc> + currentColor + design-token consumption + figcaption). Key differentiators from TriadDiagram: (1) directional arrows via SVG marker-end pattern (chevron path 'M 1 1 L 5 4 L 1 7'); (2) computed bands via stages.map → topWidth/bottomWidth/yTop/yBottom math (each band 56 tall; widths shrink by 60 per stage); (3) two-line label + detail per band (label at yTop+28; detail at yTop+44; detail opacity 0.75); (4) marker ID includes titleId suffix to prevent collision across multiple-instances-per-page (different titleId → different marker ID; SVG marker uses are scoped by ID-string match). The marker pattern is reusable for future cycle-109+ diagram components that need directional arrows (e.g., OODA loop).

step_5_recapture.method: Astro production build + dist HTML spot-check via grep + class-name presence verification
post_change_artifacts: dist/patterns/mission-decomposition/index.html — 3 occurrences of convergence-funnel + funnel-bands + funnel-arrows CSS classes; <title>Convergence funnel: Vault to Campaign to Mission to Objective.</title> rendered; <figcaption> caption rendered as 'Decomposition narrows the working set at each step — vault to objective.'
152 pages built in 5.17s (1 new MDX content edit + 1 NEW component file; component is build-time rendered so no runtime JS added)
step_5_recapture.build_result: 152 pages built in 5.17s; 0 type errors; 0 a11y warnings; build completes cleanly

step_6_validate.method: Astro production build (npm run build) exits 0 + dist HTML spot-check (grep for convergence-funnel + funnel-bands + funnel-arrows CSS classes + <title> render text + <figcaption> render text) + persona post-change scoring

persona_specific_post_change_notes.design_critic: Funnel narrows visibly through the 4 bands; arrow markers point downward; reading order top-to-bottom matches the convergence model framing. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.visual_designer: Component sits naturally after the ASCII hierarchy code block in mission-decomposition.mdx — text → ASCII → visual diagram is a 3-layer reinforcement of the same concept. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.diagram_reviewer: Default stages (Vault / Campaign / Mission / Objective) match the project CLAUDE.md Convergence Model table verbatim. Self-reference through the vault's own governance doc is the canonical aDNA discipline (Standing Order #8). Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.accessibility_auditor: Marker IDs are uniquified per instance (convergence-arrow-{titleId-random-suffix}) — multiple-instances-per-page render without ID collision. <title> + <desc> provide complete screen-reader content. Score 4.5/5.0.
persona_specific_post_change_notes.newcomer_stress_tester: First-time reader of mission-decomposition.mdx now gets 3 reinforcements: prose explanation → ASCII hierarchy → visual funnel. Each frames the same idea in a different cognitive register. Score 4.5/5.0.

lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_lift_1_philosophy_before_feature: HONORED — diagram is geometric primitives + restraint (4 trapezoids + 3 arrows + 8 text labels). No marketing imagery; no aspirational decoration; pure structural illustration.
lift_avoid_verification.m51_d11_avoid_2_marketing_style_hero_ima: AVOIDED — abstract geometric line-art only; no figurative imagery; no photography; no gradient flourishes.
lift_avoid_verification.cycle_107_directional_vs_symmetric_disti: HONORED — ConvergenceFunnel uses directional arrows (asymmetric flow); TriadDiagram used undirected lines (symmetric relationship); the distinction is now established in the diagram library vocabulary.

step_6_validate.cycle_acceptance: PASS — ConvergenceFunnel component LIVE at site/src/components/diagrams/ConvergenceFunnel.astro (156 lines); 2nd component in the diagram library; mission-decomposition.mdx wires the component as additive proof-of-consumption (1 import + 1 component tag with caption; zero existing-content disturbance); build clean at 152 pages 5.17s; dist HTML spot-check confirms 3-class occurrences + title + caption; persona post-change aggregate 4.4/5.0 across 4 primary dimensions; LIFT-1 honored + AVOID-2 avoided; directional-vs-symmetric distinction established.

step_7_record_iii_result.schema_conformance_adr_025_026: Conforms; 2nd canonical instance of diagram-component-authoring cycle JSON shape (cycle 107 1st + cycle 108 2nd); shape stabilized.

lift_carried_forward_to_cycle_109: Diagram library now has 2 reusable components (TriadDiagram + ConvergenceFunnel); cycle 109 visual identity guidelines v2 doc should reference both as canonical patterns + document the diagram-component-authoring shape: viewBox math + currentColor + role=img + aria-labelledby + figure/figcaption + Props with safe defaults
Marker arrow pattern via marker-end + per-instance ID-suffix transfers to any future directional diagram (OODA loop arrows, lattice graph edges with direction)
Two-line label+detail per band/node pattern transfers to other multi-stage diagrams
avoid_carried_forward: Do NOT cascade-rebuild after EVERY MDX content edit during cycle work — Astro caches all 26 images; rebuild only at cycle Step-5 (validate) to catch errors at a single checkpoint

Do NOT add interactive JS to diagram components without operator gate — build-time-rendered SVG is the M5.3 D11 baseline; runtime JS adds bundle cost + a11y complexity; defer to D17 if interactive diagrams are operator-requested
